name: Crazy Shopping
short_description: The time of life is limited. I just want to tell you one thing. End shopping quickly, accurately, and brilliantly.
detailed_description:
The time is money.

What a nice word ...

The time of life is limited.

Do you know?

I just want to tell you one thing.

End shopping quickly, accurately, and brilliantly.

──────────────────
[Your Objective]
Collect All Items in shopping list and go to cash register

[User Guide]
■Menu
WASD:Move
Left Mouse Button:Confirm
Right Mouse Button:Back

■Game
W.A.S.D key:Move
Left Mouse Button:Pick Item
Left Shift:Jump
R:Reset
Space key:Dash

-Compete for how fast you can run through the shopping center.
